triageFlags.title: Credit Score Below Tier B Threshold
triageFlags.description: The applicant's credit score is below the threshold for Tier B, placing them in the Sub-Prime category.
triageFlags.recommendation: Consider stricter affordability checks and ensure compliance with Tier C requirements.
triageFlags.reasoning: According to the policy, a credit score of 575 places the applicant in Tier C, which requires stricter lending criteria.

triageFlags.title: Vehicle Age Exceeds Policy Limit at Agreement End
triageFlags.description: The vehicle's age at the end of the agreement will exceed the maximum allowable age of 12 years.
triageFlags.recommendation: Review the vehicle's eligibility and consider adjusting the term or selecting a newer vehicle.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy states that the vehicle's age at the end of the agreement must not exceed 12 years. With an 80-month-old vehicle and a 60-month term, this limit is surpassed.

content.reasoning: The applicant's credit score places them in the Sub-Prime tier, necessitating stricter criteria. Additionally, the vehicle's age at the end of the agreement exceeds the policy limit, which requires further review.
